title: Peppery American Cheddar Cheese Quiche
description: A quick-fix peppery and dense American cheddar cheese quiche made with low-fat-friendly ingredients including coriander leaves for a vibrant flavor boost.

ingredients.name: Whole Milk Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Optional for thickness, can be omitted for lower calorie

ingredients.name: Cayenne Pepper
ingredients.notes: To add heat and peppery flavor

ingredients.name: Coriander Leaves
ingredients.amount: 3 tablespoons finely chopped fresh or 1 tablespoon dried, plus extra for garnish

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: To bind the mixture and enhance flavor

instructions: Mix the grated cheddar cheese with whole milk yogurt, flour, cayenne pepper, and chopped coriander leaves. Stir until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a pre-buttered pie crust.
Smooth the top of the quiche with an offset spatula or knife for a nice texture.
Bake in the oven for 25-30 minutes or until the filling is set and golden brown on top.
Allow to cool slightly before slicing. Garnish with extra coriander leaves if desired.
